Kadir Has University

Molecular Biology and Genetics

Kadir Has University Department of Molecular Biology and Genetics aims to train researchers and professionals who will lead in biotechnology, genetic engineering, bioinformatics and biomedical fields. The department, which provides education in English, offers students a comprehensive education with project-based courses, laboratory applications and collaborations with the industry. Offering the opportunity to specialise in different fields through double major and minor programmes, the department provides international experience through Erasmus+ and student exchange programmes. In addition, it supports the academic development of students with its extensive research infrastructure and seminars.
